Comment.MultiLanguageText: start BT (Bit must only be resetted as soon as done = 1)
feedback external brake; if closed = 1, if open = 0
number of brake to be tested; brake 1 = 0; brake 2 = 1
enable automatic detection of direction of test torque
manual selection of direction of test torque
selection of test sequence; sequence 1 = 0, sequence 2 = 1
signal to close the external brake; close = 1, open = 0
invalid start condition: axis not stationery
invalid start condition: pulse enable missing
UDT of test axis (has to be connected!)
sequencer step of the previous PLC cycle
TOF, Q output of deselection timer
start timer of sequencer time monitoring
timer for monitoring the steps of the sequencer
timer to delay the program, if BT is deselected
TOF, Q output sequencer time monitoring

LineComment.Text: Requirements: motor with brake; UDT "LBP_typeAxisX" of the axis to be tested
Functionality: brake test for safety axis
Version Date Expert in charge Changes applied

StructuredText.Text: return function if Test is inactive

LineComment.Text: return function while Test is inactive

StructuredText.Text: reset brake test enable when FB stopped

LineComment.Text: error number 6: SBT is cancelled with startBt=0
start Watchdog Timer on the beginning and for every new step
start step sequence with rising Edge startBt
Pulse or controller enable is missing
Set NCK Start signal for Brake test
feedback SBT selected #axisDB.SIC.SW3.SBT_Sel and test torque from drive #axisDB.SIC.SW3.SetpSettingDrive
Check if the condition of the external brake fits the request
Reset NCK Start signal for Brake test
error number 6: SBT is cancelled with startBt=0 while running without error
Wrong error number -> set Error Num 7
output error number and step number for diagnose
